text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What a great break! Ahhh, it feels like it's been
forever since I've been in your office.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I ate out with my friends, went to a public bath
with the old ladies from the shopping district, and
more. It was so fun.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But now it's back to the daily grind. Time to get
back in the groove.
